creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
I've hit 'Enter' before I could enter anything here.

I've been trying to build devel/orc on 11-CURRENT ARMv6 jail through poudriere-devel.
It seems to throw errors at the end of the building on some missing '}', I don't reckon why. But it seems to propagate on multimedia/gstreamer which is also having some problem about missing '}' if I successfully build devel/orc without examples.
